node.text:
For the final chapter of @nigo’s AF3 homecoming, it was Nigo against the rules. The rules lost.

The Nike x Nigo Air Force 3 launches on humanmade.jp on 1.31 and SNKRS on 2.6.

Not many get on a first-name basis with the world. Welcome to Nike, LISA.

@lalalalisa_m

Step inside @MEOVV ‘s home turf.

Nike Astrograbber available on nike.com.

node.text:
Pour l’amour de ce maillot.

Le chant des supporters, « Les Antilopes », nous unit derrière la grande équipe d’un grand continent.

Le maillot Air Afrique x Nike sera disponible sur SNKRS le 16 décembre 2025 @nikesportswear 

For the love of this jersey.

The chant of the supporters, « Les Antilopes », unites us behind the great team of a great continent.

The Air Afrique x Nike jersey, available on SNKRS on December 16, 2025 @nikesportswear

A night for the ones who take the game.

📍Toma Miami 

#NikeFootball #TomaElJuego

Altitude check.

Featuring waterproof GORE-TEX, hit the slopes in @jacquemus’s first ever ski collection. 

Available now on nike.com and SNKRS in select regions.

Built differently for the London derby day. Custom @chelseafc Nike Tech Boreas.

Crafted by @maxime2zblack.
@pinkpantheress backstage in her Shox Z at the After Dark Tour London 📍

There’s beauty in the breakdown.

After ten years of producing his own togei pottery, Nigo’s manifesting his latest Air Force 3 design through artisan breakage repair, or kintsugi.

The Nike Air Force 3 x NIGO launches on humanmade.jp on 11.15 and SNKRS on 11.20.
NOCTA Cardinal Stock Holiday 2025: Neptune Green, Baroque Brown, and Olive Grey as Seen in New York City. Available on NOCTA.com 11.13 and Nike.com 11.14.

node.text:
Welcome to the MAD STADIUM @ComplexCon.

Ballers went head-to-head for a chance to make it to the main stage, while @UNDEFEATEDINC @ATMOS_JAPAN @YEAT and @KIDSOFIMMIGRANTS dropped exclusive heat.

Next up, TOMA Miami.

Choose your fighter.

Enter the Martine Rose Sport Gaming Division, featuring our first-ever gaming kit. Available via SNKRS on 10.30.

Nike x @palaceskateboards. 

The P90 collection launches October 31 via Palace and November 12/13 via SNKRS in select regions.
